rationale: In the competitive-promotions background, the citing paper reports a specific result from Zhang and Wedel (2009) rather than merely listing it. The authors then use that prior evidence to motivate their gap, arguing earlier empirical work did not isolate causal effects of competitive targeting or discount-depth heterogeneity in a real-time mobile setting. So the citation helps frame the paper's positioning and contribution claims, beyond a passing mention.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Zhang and Wedel (2009) as prior empirical evidence on competitive versus loyalty promotions across online and offline channels, then extends this line to mobile geo-targeting with randomized causal tests and discount-depth interactions.
